summary: Completed frontend testing of Iteration 5 features: Admin Client Management tabs, Corporate User creation, Admin Cancel Trip button, and Corporate Dashboard password change modal. Fixed a critical bug where the frontend was calling wrong API endpoint for corporate user creation.

fixed.issue: Frontend calling wrong API endpoint /api/corporate/users instead of /api/admin/onboard-corporate-user

passed_tests: Admin Login - Login with admin@fleetOS.com / password123
Admin Client Management - Tabs render correctly (Clients tab and Corporate Users tab)
Admin Client Management - Add Corporate User button visible
Admin Create Corporate User - Modal opens with all required fields (Client Company, Full Name, Display Name, Email, Password, Role, Department)
Admin Create Corporate User - Generate password button works
Admin Create Corporate User - Form submission creates user successfully
Admin Create Corporate User - Credentials modal displays email and password after creation
Admin Create Corporate User - New user appears in Corporate Users tab
Admin Trip Management - Cancel Trip button visible for CREATED status trips
Admin Trip Management - Cancel Trip button visible for ASSIGNED status trips
Admin Trip Management - Cancel Trip button NOT visible for BILLED status trips (correct behavior)
Corporate Login - Login with hr@techcorp.in / password123
Corporate Dashboard - Settings (gear) button visible next to user profile
Corporate Password Change - Modal opens when clicking settings button
Corporate Password Change - Current Password field present
Corporate Password Change - New Password field present
Corporate Password Change - Confirm New Password field present
Corporate Password Change - Change Password button present
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ClientManagement.js (fixed API endpoint for corporate user creation)
seed_data_creation: Created test corporate user: testuser1774954590@test.com / testpass123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 5 features are fully functional after fixing the corporate user creation API endpoint. Key features tested: 1) Admin Client Management page with Clients and Corporate Users tabs, 2) Admin Create Corporate User with form validation and credentials display modal, 3) Admin Cancel Trip button appears only for trips with CREATED/ASSIGNED/ACCEPTED status (not for STARTED/COMPLETED/BILLED/CLOSED), 4) Corporate Dashboard Settings button (gear icon) next to user profile, 5) Corporate Password Change modal with current/new/confirm password fields.

corporate_settings_button.location: Next to user profile in sidebar
